zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stanley於大約1386年出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD25歲，母親Isabel de Latham22歲。他於大約1404年與Isabel de Haryngton在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1414年被列為steward of macclesfield in cheshire。他去世於1437年11月27日在英國威爾斯享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓文維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stanley于大约1386年出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD25岁，母亲Isabel de Latham22岁。他于大约1404年与Isabel de Haryngton在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1414年被列为steward of macclesfield in cheshire。他去世于1437年11月27日在英国威尔斯享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾沃林頓文維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stanley was born about 1386, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD, was 25 and his mother, Isabel de Latham, was 22. He married Isabel de Haryngton about 1404, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1414, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as steward of macclesfield in cheshire. He died on 27 November 1437, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stanley est né environ 1386, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Latham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Haryngton environ 1404, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1414, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of macclesfield in cheshire. Il est décédé le 27 novembre 1437, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, England: Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Stanley um 1386 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD 25 und seine Mutter Isabel de Latham 22. Er hat um 1404 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England Isabel de Haryngton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1414, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als steward of macclesfield in cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. November 1437 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley è nato il circa 1386 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Latham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Haryngton circa 1404, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Nel 1414, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of macclesfield in cheshire. Morì il 27 novembre 1437, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanleyが約1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORDは25歳，母Isabel de Lathamは22歳であった。約1404年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルでIsabel de Haryngtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1414年，29歳の時，職業はsteward of macclesfield in cheshireと記録されている。彼は1437年11月27日にイギリスウェールズで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンウィンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanley(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Latham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 Isabel de Haryngton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1414년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 steward of macclesfield in cheshire이었다. 그는 1437년 11월 27일 영국 웨일스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴 윈윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Latham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Haryngton aproximadamente 1404, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1414, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como steward of macclesfield in cheshire. Ele faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1437, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, England: Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stanley родился около 1386 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Latham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Haryngton около 1404 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1414 году, в возрасте 29 лет, работал по профессии steward of macclesfield in cheshire. Он умер 27 ноября 1437 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности винвикк, варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stanley nació aproximadamente 1386, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel de Latham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Isabel de Haryngton aproximadamente 1404, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1414, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era steward of macclesfield in cheshire. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1437, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Winwick, Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
